name: Chocolate Pudding Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Use a 3.25 to 4 ounce package of REGULAR pudding mix.
1. Cream butter and sugar until well combined.
2. Blend in eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
3. Whisk together flour, chocolate pudding mix, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the creamed ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Stir in chopped nuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
8. Allow to cool completely before removing from the pan.
9. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top of the cooled brownies, if desired.
10. Cut into bars.
Makes 24 brownies.
